vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. The P3 Pothos (anchor) and P2/P4 specimens are no longer visible as healthy plants. The white rabbit anchor is missing from the current frame.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss (Yellow pot is present but empty/soil only)
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss (Black pot is present but empty/soil only)

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: The Pothos specimen has been removed or has completely withered; the rabbit anchor is absent.
plant_audit.P4: No evidence of Silver Guest; soil appears undisturbed or barren.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Persistent white particulate matter (likely crushed eggshell) remains in the black pot, acting as a static marker.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-2: Initial state shows a single green leaf in the black pot and a white rabbit anchor in the P3 pot.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Total loss of biological material. The environment has transitioned to a 'dark state' where no plant matter is discernible under current lighting.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-viable. All registered specimens have either been removed or have suffered total senescence/collapse. The absence of the rabbit anchor suggests a deliberate clearing or a total failure of the indoor garden setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The removal of the white rabbit anchor is the primary anomaly. The transition from a populated desk to a barren one indicates a complete reset or abandonment of the botanical project.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Starting from a state where at least one specimen (P3) was identifiable, the sequence documents a rapid decline and eventual disappearance of all plant life. The current state is a dark, empty, and non-functional biome.
